description: APED prd.md — produced by aped-prd (step-03 + step-04 + step-06), consumed by aped-ux/aped-arch/aped-epics. Cohort-3 (6.10.0). WARN-only producer-side; ERROR escalation locked for 7.0.0.

sections.heading: Out of Scope
sections._note: step-03 marks this 'Required — prevents scope creep in epics/arch downstream'. Cohort-3 enforces it structurally.

sections.heading: User Journeys
sections._note: Body is free-form prose/bullets — journeys vary widely by product. No lines_match here; over-locking on per-project shape variation (audit 08 §22).

sections.heading: Functional Requirements
sections._note: FR bullets accept legacy `FR1:`, canonical `FR-1:`, and bold-wrapped `**FR-1:**` forms (mirrors oracle-prd.sh regex).
